title: Wetland Ecosystem Services and E-Waste Threats
description: A conceptual diagram illustrating the critical services provided by wetland ecosystems and how improper e-waste disposal threatens these functions, highlighting the connection to environmental management.
relationships: E-Waste leaches Heavy Metals and Toxic Chemicals into the Wetland
Toxins contaminate the Soil and Groundwater
Toxins accumulate in Plant & Animal Life, harming Biodiversity
Pollutants degrade the wetland's Carbon Sequestration capacity
Contaminated soil reduces water absorption efficiency for Flood Control
